description: Default rules for transfer detection. These can be overridden by user-specific rules in the database.

notes.why_configurable: This file allows admins to add new patterns without code changes. In the future, users can create custom rules via UI.
notes.ml_transition: Once ML/Ntropy is implemented, these rules will serve as fallback for edge cases and user overrides.
notes.adding_keywords: To add a keyword: 1) Add it to the appropriate array, 2) Restart the server. User-specific rules can be added via database.
